texto: Storytelling is an ancient art that rarely receives the respect it deserves. Is it even possible to find someone these days with the time to give something precious to listeners, who understands stories at a profound level and can tell them without a book or a page in hand?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Erika Eichenseer que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Storytelling is an ancient art that rarely receives the respect it deserves. Is it even possible …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, fairy-tales, storytelling, com foco em storytelling.
